{"description":"Explore Kody engine lifecycle labels","prompt":"I need to understand how the Kody engine handles lifecycle labels/stages for tasks. Please:

1. Find and read any files related to lifecycle labels, stages, or task state management in the Kody engine (likely in node_modules/@kody-ade/engine or similar)
2. Look for how stages like planning, building, verifying, review, done are defined and tracked
3. Find how status.json files are written/updated as tasks progress through stages
4. Look for any TypeScript types or enums defining lifecycle stages/labels

Search in:
- /home/runner/work/Kody-Engine-Tester/Kody-Engine-Tester/node_modules/@kody-ade/engine/
- Any other relevant kody-related directories

Focus on finding: stage definitions, lifecycle label types, status tracking logic.","subagent_type":"Explore"}
